summary: Running Balance Feature - ALL TESTS PASS. Tested new running balance column feature in Party Ledger UI and Cash Book exports. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests passed. Frontend: Party Ledger shows Balance (₹) column with Dr/Cr suffix, TOTAL row shows final balance. Cash Book PDF and Excel exports include Balance(Rs.) column with running balance values.

1_party_ledger_balance_column.details: Balance (₹) column header visible in Party Ledger table. Shows running balance for each transaction row.
1_party_ledger_balance_column.test_evidence: Screenshot confirmed Balance column with values ₹20,000 (Cr), ₹30,000 (Dr), ₹50,000 (Dr)

2_party_ledger_dr_cr_suffix.details: Running balance values display Dr/Cr suffix correctly. Dr for debit balance, Cr for credit balance.
2_party_ledger_dr_cr_suffix.test_evidence: Verified (Dr) and (Cr) suffixes in balance column values

3_party_ledger_total_row_balance.details: TOTAL row shows final running balance with Dr/Cr suffix

4_cash_book_pdf_balance_column.details: Cash Book PDF export includes Balance(Rs.) column with running balance per transaction

5_cash_book_excel_balance_column.details: Cash Book Excel export includes Balance (₹) column at position 8 with running balance per row
5_cash_book_excel_balance_column.test_evidence: Excel column H contains running balance values: -2000, 48000, 68000, 18000, 18000 (TOTAL)

8_backend_api_party_ledger.details: Returns ledger, total_debit, total_credit, party_list fields

9_running_balance_computation_logic.details: Running balance computed as cumulative (jama - nikasi) sorted by date ascending for exports, and oldest-first reverse mapping for Party Ledger UI

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 - Running Balance feature fully tested. Party Ledger UI now shows Balance (₹) column with Dr/Cr suffix for each transaction and in TOTAL row. Cash Book PDF and Excel exports include Balance column with running balance computed as cumulative (jama - nikasi). All implementations verified in Python backend (cashbook.py), desktop-app (cashbook.js), and local-server (cashbook.js). 11 backend tests pass.
